# D3keyHelperForLinux v1.0.6

This release focuses on UI documentation cleanup and lighter GUI typography.

## Highlights

- Reworked `docs/UI_DESIGN.md` from an outdated next-version proposal into a current implementation and maintenance guide.
- Updated the UI design guide to document the active PySide6 / Qt Widgets / PySide6-Fluent-Widgets stack.
- Refreshed `docs/ui-preview.svg` to match the current toolbar, sidebar navigation, two-column general settings page, and bottom status strip.
- Reduced global GUI font weight from medium to normal so Chinese and English text appears less heavy.
- Updated navigation, status messages, Safezone status text, and skill queue warnings to use the lighter typography.
- Kept the existing runtime macro behavior and configuration format unchanged.

## Notes

- Existing `d3oldsand.ini` profiles remain compatible.
- This release does not change default config paths.
- The AppImage artifact is built automatically by GitHub Actions for this tag.

## 中文摘要

- 重新整理 `docs/UI_DESIGN.md`，从旧的“下一版方案”改成当前 UI 实现说明和维护准则。
- 更新设计文档，明确当前使用 PySide6 / Qt Widgets / PySide6-Fluent-Widgets。
- 刷新 `docs/ui-preview.svg`，让预览图匹配当前工具栏、左侧导航、通用页双列布局和底部状态栏。
- 将 GUI 全局字重从 medium 降为 normal，整体文字更轻。
- 同步调整导航、状态提示、Safezone 状态和技能队列警告的字重。
- 不改变运行器逻辑、默认配置路径和原有 `d3oldsand.ini` 兼容性。
